description: 12 deterministische Capability-Tests fuer Worker-Admission in Kemmer-Grid. Masterplan v2 Patch P4: ersetzt Hash-Match-Admission-Gate durch funktional evidenzbasierte Capability-Pruefung.

tasks.command: cd /tmp && rm -rf grid-test && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/meokemmer-jpg/kemmer-grid-infra.git grid-test && ls grid-test/README.md
python3 -c "import json, sys; assert sys.version_info >= (3,12); print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'py': sys.version_info[:2]}))"

tasks.description: Gemini CLI liefert non-empty Antwort auf trivial prompt

tasks.command: copilot -p 'What is 2+2? Answer with just the number.' --no-stream 2>&1 | head -10

cd /tmp/grid-test && git checkout -b test/golden-$(date +%s) && echo 'test' > TEST.md && git add TEST.md && git config user.email test@grid.local && git config user.name GridTest && git commit -m 'golden-test' && git log -1 --format=%H

tasks.command_windows: python -c "import json,os,socket; p='G:/Meine Ablage/Claude-Knowledge-System/branch-hub/status/'+socket.gethostname()+'-golden-test.json'; d={'test':True,'ts':__import__('datetime').datetime.now().isoformat()}; open(p,'w').write(json.dumps(d)); r=json.load(open(p)); print('MATCH' if r['test'] else 'FAIL'); os.remove(p)"
tasks.command_unix: python3 -c "import json,os,socket; p='/Volumes/GoogleDrive/Meine Ablage/Claude-Knowledge-System/branch-hub/status/'+socket.gethostname()+'-golden-test.json'; d={'test':True,'ts':__import__('datetime').datetime.now().isoformat()}; open(p,'w').write(json.dumps(d)); r=json.load(open(p)); print('MATCH' if r['test'] else 'FAIL'); os.remove(p)"

tasks.command_windows: pwsh -File scripts\kill-switch.ps1 test 2>&1; if (Test-Path $HOME\.kemmer-grid\killed.flag) { Remove-Item $HOME\.kemmer-grid\killed.flag; Write-Output 'FLAG_CLEARED' } else { Write-Output 'NO_FLAG' }
tasks.command_unix: sh scripts/kill-switch.sh test 2>&1; if [ -f $HOME/.kemmer-grid/killed.flag ]; then rm $HOME/.kemmer-grid/killed.flag; echo FLAG_CLEARED; else echo NO_FLAG; fi

scoring.description: 10 von 12 Tasks muessen pass liefern innerhalb max_latency_seconds. Unter 10: Admission DENIED, Worker in Quarantaene.

quarantine_behavior.on_fail: Schreibe quarantine-reason.json in branch-hub/status/. Setze quarantine_status=true in grid-endpoints.json. Benachrichtige Master via inbox.
quarantine_behavior.recovery: Nach Fix: re-run golden-task-suite. Wenn >=10 pass: Quarantaene aufgehoben.
